title: utils.RunUnderSystemdScope(): always close Conn
body: Make sure we close our private connection to the bus, even if we're not successful in in using it to ask systemd to move a unit's processes to a specific control group.

comments.body: Ran into this while attempting to debug #11263.  The symptom is that `podman` opens connections to the system bus daemon until the system bus daemon determines that it's exceeded the per-UID limit on active connections to the bus daemon (default is 256), and starts refusing new connections from the invoking user (i.e., root).  Then `podman` starts relaying back errors from `crun` that look like `sd-bus call: No buffer space available` because `crun` can't contact the system bus, either.
